$comment: c76 (D-AS-REGALLOC-WIDE-CALL-OPERAND-COUNT, option E; 2026-07-01): the pre-regalloc wide-call materialization (lir_wide_call_args.cpp) must handle a VARIADIC callee. On SysV the fixed `n` takes rdi and the 10 int varargs travel the variadicArgsAlwaysStack path to the outgoing stack; the outgoing arg list exceeds the register file, so the split to `store_outgoing_arg` carriers is required or the Call exhausts regalloc. WITNESS: vsum weights each vararg by position k (1..10); values descending 10..1 give every position a distinct value AND weight, so a swap or a wrong overflow-slot read changes the sum (delta=(vi-vj)(j-i)!=0). sum_{k=1..10}(11-k)*k = 220. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the pass -> error[L_VirtualRegInPostRegalloc]. Int-only varargs, so the release arm is safe. => 220.
